# Buy Online Pick Up In Store

Items marked available for pickup can be reserved online and collected from a chosen store, usually ready in under two hours during opening hours. The order page shows a ready-for-pickup status and sends an email once the products are waiting at the counter.

[Source: store_pickup.md#buy-online-pick-up-in-store]
